CREATE TABLE hosts (id Int32, host_name String);
CREATE TABLE distributed_hosts AS hosts ENGINE = Distributed('cluster', 'hosts', rand());
SELECT hostName() FROM hosts WHERE id = 1;
WITH (SELECT hostName() AS server_name) AS subquery SELECT server_name, COUNT(*) FROM distributed_hosts GROUP BY server_name;
SELECT DISTINCT hostName() AS unique_hosts FROM (SELECT hostName() FROM hosts UNION ALL SELECT hostName() FROM distributed_hosts);
CREATE TABLE shard_hosts (shard_id Int32, host_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY shard_id;
INSERT INTO shard_hosts SELECT number, hostName() FROM numbers(5);
SELECT hostName(), id FROM shard_hosts ORDER BY shard_id;
SELECT hostName() AS current_host FROM system.processes WHERE current_host = hostName();
